channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-06
item.description:
Our community has been buzzing with activity across multiple projects, with notable progress in `scienceverse/metacheck` and `JamieCummins/regcheck`. In `scienceverse/metacheck`, the `data_check` branch saw significant improvements, including bug fixes, added archive reports, and enhanced OSF download functionality, all aimed at providing better feedback. Meanwhile, `JamieCummins/regcheck` updated its default OpenAI model and made aesthetic bug fixes on the `staging` branch, while also improving backend handling of insufficient evidence. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with both focusing on enhancing user experience and data handling. As our community continues to grow and collaborate, we celebrate these milestones and look forward to seeing the impact of these improvements on our research tools. With these advancements, we're poised to make even more exciting discoveries and push the boundaries of open-source research.

69 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck29 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck12 commits
escicheck5 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. The commit message specifically mentions "admin updates", indicating that changes were made to the administrative aspects of the repository. A merge was also performed on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, incorporating changes from the same branch on the remote repository, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch that was worked on in these commits. The changes made were limited to administrative updates and a self-merge on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The `staging` branch was the focus of the recent work, where the default OpenAI model was updated. Additionally, on the `staging` branch, "aesthetic bug fixes" were made, as described in the commit message. The `staging` branch also saw changes to the backend, specifically to "improve backend handling of insufficient evidence", according to the commit message. The work on the `staging` branch appears to be preparing it for further development or deployment. No other branches were modified in this set of commits.

3 commit(s) today:

  • f02456c [staging] update default openai model — Jamie Cummins
  • 90c62a8 [staging] aesthetic bug fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • efb74a8 [staging] improve backend handling of insufficient evidence — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
